index_paragraph1: Projekt City is a unique and expansive Minecraft project that operates without funding and is entirely free to play for everyone. Our mission is to develop an easily navigable Minecraft world for everyone, while paying a lot of attention to details and flawless work. Within "Projekt City," we are constructing a large map that features a city, an airport, a hotel, and much more, with meticulous attention to detail and precision. We enhance the gameplay through intricate redstone creations and commands.
index_paragraph2: The Projekt City map spans 1,164 meters in width and 1,833 meters in length, covering a total area of 2,133,612 square meters, making it a very large Minecraft project! Our current efforts are focused on developing the airport and hotel, which occupy a significant portion of the map.
index_paragraph3: All versions after 4.1 are in English and will remain so until the project's completion, as adding other languages is a significant undertaking. We plan to introduce additional languages, such as German, French, and Italian, after completing the project to enhance accessibility for more players.
index_paragraph4: To provide detailed information, we have launched a website where players can find essential details and ask questions. We strive to address player requests swiftly and professionally, aiming to create a bug-free world. We encourage you to report any bugs or errors on our Discord server or forum. We are committed to enhancing our professionalism and skills in building, redstone, and commands to become more professional, more accurate and better!
index_img_planes_alt: The picture shows a peaceful Minecraft scene on a sunny day. At the center of the shot is a small airport with a large passenger plane parked on the tarmac. The plane, a Boeing 737, is white with blue accents and looks ready to take off. The airport itself is very large, but it has all the important facilities such as a runway, hangars and even a small control tower.
index_img_planes_caption: Many aircraft flying around the world and transporting passengers
index_img_subway_alt: In the foreground is a railroad line with several tracks leading into a dark tunnel on the right-hand side of the picture. The tracks are made of wood and metal. The landscape in which the town is embedded contains green hills, scattered trees and a small field with flowers and plants.
index_img_subway_caption: The subway station that efficiently connects the city, the airport, and the hotel
index_img_parking_alt: The picture shows a large parking garage on a sunny day. The multi-storey building with a gray facade and many windows dominates most of the picture. In front of the parking garage is a parking lot and a street. A blue sign with a white “P” marks the parking garage, and a parking deck can be seen on the roof.
index_img_parking_caption: A huge parking facility to safely store the cars of all guests traveling away from home
index_img_mountain_alt: The picture shows a large mountain in the foreground, which is surrounded by a railroad line. The striking mountain with its pyramid-shaped peak is the dominant element of the image. A highway with several cars runs around the mountain, with cars driving on it. Other mountains and a small town can be seen in the background, adding to the varied landscape.
index_img_mountain_caption: A large mountain with a long highway that makes traveling more efficient and easier than ever before.
index_img_highway_alt: The picture shows a country road lined with trees and running under a high-voltage power line. A blue truck is driving on the road in the viewer's line of sight. A yellow car and a building can be seen in the background. The road is gray and has yellow lines on the sides marking the lanes.
index_img_highway_caption: The highway, which makes the city, airport and suburbs quickly and efficiently accessible
index_img_city_alt: In this scene, a charming town street is depicted, complete with a quaint shop bearing the sign 'SHOP'. The street is crafted from stone bricks, adding a medieval touch to the setting. On the right side of the street, the 'SHOP' building stands out with its unique design, featuring a combination of stone and wood, and a roof adorned with red accents. The building's walls are made of stone, while the roof showcases red bricks, creating a visually appealing contrast.
index_img_city_caption: The city with more houses, better facilities, and a key card system to ensure maximum security
index_img_hotel_alt: The picture shows several buildings connected by stairs and railings. The buildings are made of different materials and in different styles, including a house with a pitched roof and a building with a white façade and a brown roof. The stairs and railings are made of wood and stone and look very detailed. The scene is shot from a slightly elevated perspective.
index_img_hotel_caption: The hotel, to accommodate all our guests, with a variety of suites and rooms and a key card system to maintain order and ensure security
index_trailer_blocked_desc: This video is hosted by YouTube. To watch it, please allow third-party content in your cookie settings.
index_faq_q1: Am I allowed to use the world on a public server?
index_faq_a1_combined: Yes, you may use our world on servers, but you must draw attention to our project and inform us about it. Further information about how you are allowed to use our world can you find in our ${use_our_world_link}.
index_faq_q2: Does it cost money to play the world?
index_faq_a2: No, Projekt City is completely free to play. You still need to own Minecraft before playing to be able to play the world.
index_faq_q3: I have found an error, what do I do?
index_faq_a3_combined: First of all, thank you for finding this bug. You can find the form to report bugs under the following address: ${bug_report_link}. Open the link, fill out the form as precise as you can and we will take care of the bug. If we need further information, we will reach out to you.
index_faq_q4: On which platforms can you also find Projekt City?
index_faq_a4_combined: You can find Projekt City on Instagram, Threads, TikTok and YouTube. And more platforms will follow! You can find our social media channels at ${linktree_link}.
index_faq_q5: When will there be a new update for the map?
index_faq_a5_combined: Our biggest update V5.0 is out now and is waiting to be downloaded by you! V6.0 will follow shortly and contain even more improvements and innovations. You can download it here: ${curseforge_link}
